name: Computer & IT Equipment
subject: Cable specs for your IT catalog
body:
Hi {contact_name},

{company_name} has a solid IT product lineup. One thing we help system integrators with — enterprise-grade cables at factory-direct pricing, with full certification docs your customers actually need.

HDMI 2.1/2.2, DP 2.1 (80Gbps), USB4 (80Gbps), CAT6A/CAT8 — all TDR and eye-diagram tested before shipment. Trusted by IT distributors across Europe.

Want me to send over spec sheets and a sample quote? No obligation — just for comparison.
